words.meaning: closet (built into the wall, usu. with sliding doors)
to go to and from (a place)
head (chief, director) of a section or department
a long time (since the last time)
limited express (train for which a limited-express ticket is required)
to move (to another place or state)
local specialty or souvenir bought as a gift while traveling (travelling)
visit (to someone affected by illness or misfortune)
